Scrollytelling Comic Coding

An interactive webcomic built to teach coding through scrolling narrative.

Role

Creator & Developer

Tools

  • HTML
  • CSS
  • JavaScript

Overview

An interactive webcomic built to teach coding through scrolling narrative.

Problem

Make coding lessons feel like a story rather than a lesson plan.

Process

Use scroll-triggered animations and narrative panels to guide the reader.

Final Solution

A scrolling comic interface that reveals ideas with motion and browser-style presentation.

Images

Open live project

Reflection

This project blends storytelling with code and shows how animation can make concepts stick.

Overview

This is a sample project written in Markdown. Use the frontmatter at the top to populate the project metadata (title, image, role, tools, etc.).
